2025 Historical Data

Active & Churned Clinics · Jan – Dec 2025
ⓘ Methodology note: Active clinic count reflects the number of CHD offices with a live subscription at the end of each month, including offices that have since cancelled. Churn reflects cancellations that occurred within that calendar month. New reflects offices whose subscription started within that month. Data is reconstructed from current Stripe records and may not capture accounts deleted entirely from Stripe.
